title: Mounted Local Studio Activity Route
summary: Mounted the Studio Activity route shell in the local Studio app server and retired the old Jekyll route shell.
effect: The local Studio app now serves /studio/activity/?mode=manage with the existing vanilla Studio Activity browser module, modal module, and route-ready contract. The route keeps the existing catalogue sibling read endpoint for activity feed data, and the old Jekyll /studio/activity/ shell has been removed. The catalogue activity-feed read remains a sibling call for a later route-family API consolidation slice.
verification: Python compile checks passed for the touched Studio app server, view, config, and smoke files
